verified.title: ✅ Verified
verified.body: Issued by {entity} (SEBI reg {reg}). Published {date} via {channel}. Tamper-evident log entry #{seq}.

verified_notice.title: ⚠️ Verified — with notice
verified_notice.body: Validly signed by {entity} on {date}, but the signing key was revoked on {revoked_date}. Confirm on the entity's official channel before acting.

official_claim_unverified.title: ⚠️ Caution — cannot be confirmed
official_claim_unverified.body: This claims to be from {claimed}, but no registered communication matches. Treat it as unsafe.

likely_fake.title: 🚨 High risk — likely fake
likely_fake.body: {top_reason}. Do not act on it. Never pay or share OTPs based on this message.

informational.title: ℹ️ No official claim detected
informational.body: This doesn't claim to be an official market communication. Stay alert for guaranteed-return promises.

advice.sebi_check: Before paying anyone, verify the payee on SEBI Check.

reasons.SIG_CHAIN_VALID: Digital signature chain is valid and the signing key was active at the time.
reasons.C2PA_VALID: Content credentials (C2PA) manifest is present and valid.
reasons.C2PA_MISSING: No content credentials manifest was found.
reasons.C2PA_INVALID: Content credentials manifest is present but failed to validate.
reasons.TAMPERED_SIGNATURE: The signature does not validate against an active key at the time of signing.
reasons.TAMPERED_CONTENT: This references a specific communication, but the content doesn't match it.
reasons.KEY_REVOKED_AFTER_SIGNING: The signing key was revoked after this content was signed.
reasons.HASH_EXACT_MATCH: Content is byte-identical to a registered communication.
reasons.PHASH_MATCH: Content matches a registered communication's image.
reasons.PDQ_MATCH: Content matches a registered communication's image (PDQ).
reasons.SIMHASH_MATCH: Content matches a registered communication's text.
reasons.VIDEO_MATCH: Content matches a registered communication's video.
reasons.PHASH_NEAR: Content is visually close to a registered communication but not an exact match — possible tampered copy.
reasons.COMM_WITHDRAWN: The matching communication was withdrawn by its issuer.
reasons.ENTITY_CLAIM_STRONG: This content names a specific registered entity.
reasons.ENTITY_CLAIM_WEAK: This content uses official-sounding language without naming a specific entity.
reasons.HOMOGLYPH_ENTITY: The entity name uses look-alike characters to imitate a registered name.
reasons.LOOKALIKE_DOMAIN: This domain closely imitates a registered domain.
reasons.DOMAIN_REGISTERED: This domain is registered to the named entity.
reasons.DOMAIN_NOT_REGISTERED: This domain is not registered to any known entity.
reasons.DKIM_ALIGN_PASS: Email authentication (DKIM) aligns with the sending domain.
reasons.DKIM_ALIGN_FAIL: Email authentication (DKIM) does not align with the sending domain.
reasons.AUTH_HEADERS_UNAVAILABLE: Original authentication headers unavailable on forwarded mail.
reasons.BLACKLIST_MATCH: This matches a known scam pattern.
reasons.RISK_PHRASES: Contains language commonly used in investment scams.
reasons.PAYMENT_ASK: Asks for a direct payment or transfer.
reasons.NO_OFFICIAL_CLAIM: Does not claim to be from any registered entity.
